footer.description: Preserving the legacy of a People's Artist of Kazakhstan.

home.subtitle: The master of the line, the soul of the steppe. A luminary of Kazakhstan's national graphics.
home.quote:
There is the element of Water,
The element of Earth,
The element of Mountains...
My works are born from the element of the Soul!
